footer.brandDesc: Find and book the perfect meeting room for your team. Powered by NestJS, PostgreSQL, and Redis.

hero.title: Find your perfect meeting room
hero.subtitle: Book conference rooms, event spaces, and collaboration hubs — instantly.
hero.errorPastStart: Check-in must be today or in the future.
hero.errorInvalidRange: Check-out must be on or after check-in.

earlyBird.title: Early Bird
earlyBird.subtitle: Book rooms 48 h in advance and skip the rush

teamBundle.title: Team Rooms
teamBundle.subtitle: Spaces for 10+ people — perfect for workshops

videoReady.title: Video-Ready
videoReady.subtitle: Full AV setup — webcam, screen share, call

focusPods.title: Focus Pods
focusPods.subtitle: Soundproof 1–2 person booths for deep work

naturalLight.title: Natural Light
naturalLight.subtitle: Sun-filled rooms — boost focus and creativity

whyUs.rooms500Desc: From intimate focus booths to large boardrooms — 500+ spaces to choose from.
whyUs.instantDesc: Reserve with a hold, confirm at checkout. No double-bookings, ever.
whyUs.secureDesc: GDPR compliant. Your data stays yours — export or delete any time.
whyUs.smartDesc: Filter by capacity, amenities, and availability. Find the right room in seconds.

cta.title: Ready to book your next room?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of teams who use RoomBook every day.

search.loginBanner: Sign in to reserve rooms instantly.
search.noRoomsSubtitle: Try adjusting your filters or searching a different time range

filters.heading: Filter rooms
filters.checkInError: Check-in must be today or later
filters.checkOutError: Check-out must be on or after check-in

roomDetail.policy1: Bookings can be cancelled up to 30 minutes before the start time.
roomDetail.policy2: Please leave the room in the same condition as you found it.
roomDetail.policy3: Maximum occupancy must not exceed the listed capacity.
roomDetail.noDatesMsg: Go back and select dates to reserve this room.
roomDetail.loginCtaText: Create a free account or sign in to reserve this room.

checkout.warningBanner: ⚠ Less than 60 seconds left — complete your booking now.

expired.title: Reservation expired
expired.message: This reservation has already expired. Please search again.

expiryModal.title: Reservation expired
expiryModal.message: Your reservation timer has ended. This room is now available for others.
expiryModal.recheckBtn: Check availability again for this room

bookings.title: My Bookings
bookings.emptySubtitle: Search for a room and book one to see it here

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Start booking rooms in seconds
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

profile.googleOnly: Your account uses Google Sign-In — no password to change.
profile.failedToSaveName: Failed to save name. Please try again.

gdpr.title: Privacy & Data Rights
gdpr.intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) you have the right to access, control, and delete your personal data. This page lets you exercise all of those rights.

consent.title: Consent Preferences
consent.desc: Choose which optional data processing activities you consent to. Essential operations (booking management, authentication) always apply and cannot be disabled.
consent.analyticsLabel: Analytics — Help us understand how the app is used to improve it
consent.marketingLabel: Marketing — Receive product news and special offers

restriction.title: Right to Restriction & Right to Object
restriction.desc: You may request that we restrict how we process your data, or object to certain uses such as profiling and automated decision-making.
restriction.restrictLabel: Restrict processing — Limit data use to the minimum required for the service

access.title: Right to Access & Data Portability
access.desc: Download a machine-readable copy of all personal data we hold about you — your profile and booking history — as a JSON file.

erasure.title: Right to Erasure
erasure.desc: Permanently delete your account. This removes your profile, all bookings, and all session data.

contact.title: Contact & Complaints
contact.desc: To exercise rights not covered above — or to file a complaint — contact our Data Protection Officer at
contact.descSuffix: . You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority.

errors.EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: No account found with this email. Please check the address or create an account.
errors.GOOGLE_ACCOUNT_ONLY: This email is linked to a Google account. Please use "Sign in with Google" instead.
errors.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.MISSING_REFRESH_TOKEN: You are not signed in. Please sign in to continue.
errors.USER_NOT_FOUND: Account not found. It may have been deleted.
errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
errors.HOLD_EXPIRED: Your reservation timed out. Please go back and reserve again.
errors.HOLD_NOT_FOUND: Reservation not found. Please start a new booking.
errors.BOOKING_CONFLICT: This time slot is no longer available. Please choose a different time.
errors.BOOKING_ALREADY_CANCELLED: This booking has already been cancelled.
errors.MISSING_FIELDS: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.INVALID_TIME_RANGE: End time must be after start time.
errors.ROOM_NOT_FOUND: This room is no longer available.
errors.HOLDS_UNAVAILABLE: The reservation system is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.NO_PASSWORD: Your account uses Google Sign-In and has no password. You can set one in account settings.
errors.WRONG_PASSWORD_CHANGE: The current password you entered is incorrect.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.THROTTLE: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Some fields are invalid. Please check your input.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
errors.http400: The request was invalid. Please check your input.
errors.http401: You need to be signed in to do that.
errors.http403: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.http404: The requested item was not found.
errors.http409: A conflict occurred — the item may already be taken.
errors.http422: Some fields are invalid. Please review your input.
errors.http429: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.http500: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
errors.http503: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
